reason: Source of truth for strict NIP-only community semantics, nip72 package introduction, and ownership boundaries between nip72, nostr_sdk thread helpers, and System query APIs.
Current fork architecture and existing community-thread APIs that will be reshaped around a new nip72 parser layer and smaller composable retrieval APIs.
Current public SDK/community helper usage that must be updated consistently when thread/community responsibilities move to nip72 plus smaller SDK helpers.
